what_is_trained: No fitted cross-series model; each series is forecast from its own seasonal history.
StatsForecast fits a separate statistical model for each unique_id.
with_mstl_component_scope: MSTL decomposition and seasonal-naive seasonal component are local per series; adjusted component is also modeled locally.

what_is_trained: MLForecast builds lag/date features and trains one supervised model across all selected series in the dataset-frequency experiment.
with_mstl_component_scope: MSTL decomposition and seasonal component are local per series; adjusted component model is global across selected series.

what_is_trained: NeuralForecast trains neural models on the full selected-series panel for the dataset-frequency experiment.
with_mstl_component_scope: MSTL decomposition and seasonal component are local per series; adjusted component model is global across selected series.

what_is_trained: PatchTST is trained on the full selected-series panel for the dataset-frequency experiment.
with_mstl_component_scope: MSTL decomposition and seasonal component are local per series; adjusted component model is global across selected series.
